Happy birthday,
my love ♥
a letter · for you
Happy Birthday
♥
Tap to Open
Happy Birthday, Marius.
Thank you for always being so kind, fun, and for creating such wonderful moments together. I'm so grateful for all the happiness you bring into my life.

I wish I could be celebrating this special day with you in person, but until we can, I wanted to celebrate you by sharing some of the beautiful moments we've shared together.
Juna
swipe to turn the page →
Tokyo
I still remember our first date and how drawn I felt to you from the very beginning. Hearing from you right after, saying you wanted to see me again, made me so happy. I'll always treasure that day we talked over matcha and shared such honest and meaningful conversations. That was the day I felt even more strongly that I wanted to know you better.
No. 001
swipe →
Nagano
Our trip to Nagano will always be one of my favorite memories. Exploring new places together made me realize how much I loved sharing adventures with you. I still remember how you held onto me on the icy path and how safe and cared for I felt with you. Even doing face masks together made me smile and made me think we could make such a cute little beauty-nerd couple.
No. 002
swipe →
Nagano
Walking hand in hand with you through the falling snow, making our way up the mountain together, is a memory I'll always hold close. On the bus ride back, I loved how our questions led us into deeper conversations and helped us get to know each other even more. I'll never forget how we wrote our questions and answers to each other on our phones on the quiet bus ride — it was so funny and somehow really special when I think back on it. I was so happy when you asked what I would do if you asked me to be your girlfriend. That felt like the moment something between us quietly changed.
No. 003
swipe →
Tokyo
I was so happy that you came back to Tokyo to spend more time together. That meant so much to me. I'll always remember walking through Shinjuku Gyoen with coffee in hand, then sitting beside you on a bench, taking in the beautiful view and the warmth of the day. Everything felt so peaceful, relaxed, and quietly happy — as if time was moving more slowly for us. It's a moment I often wish we could go back to. I still smile when I think about us lining up together afterward for udon, your favorite Japanese food. It was one of those simple, perfect dates.
No. 004
swipe →
Tokyo
Seeing you play with the big fluffy dogs was honestly one of the cutest things, and it made me so happy. I really appreciated that you made the reservation for us, and sharing that experience together was so much fun. I also loved going to the Japanese-style café in Shibuya, relaxing with matcha in such a cozy space and talking with you. Leaning on you, sitting beside you, and simply sharing those quiet moments made me realize how happy I feel doing even the simplest things with you. It made me wish we could have days like that together all the time.
No. 005
swipe →
Happy
Birthday,
my love.
I hope we keep making beautiful memories like these together. I can't wait to celebrate with you in person when we see each other in Europe. Let's make this coming year a wonderful one, full of happiness, laughter, and beautiful moments together.
Love you. ♥
